headline: England Fly, Panama Pack Their Bags
text: A good night for Alex as England battered Croatia 4-2, while Sara nicked a 1-0 win for Ghana over Panama. Chris also kept Colombia ticking with a 3-1 success against Nana’s Uzbekistan, and Jack shared the spoils in a 1-1 with DR Congo. Top of the pile is still Grandad on 7, with Nana and Christopher next on 6. At the wrong end, Sofia remains stuck on 1, while Rosaria, Jack and Carolina are all still trying to find a decent run of form.
